name: Erbud S.A.
summary: Erbud S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the construction business in European Union countries. It operates through Residential/Commercial Buildings at Home, Residential/Commercial Buildings in Foreign Countries, Road Engineering, Industrial Construction at Home, Industrial Construction in Foreign Countries, and Other segments. The company's projects include offices, shopping centers, power industry, industrial buildings and facilities, residential buildings, public utilities, hotels, and hospitals. Erbud S.A. was founded in 1990 and is based in Warsaw, Poland.
